textPlain: Have you played Atari today? 11 year old me was able to always answer that question yes.So many times the box art would totally capture my imagination. I'd ask for some cartridge for Christmas or my birthday and it was always a bit of a gut punch to see the screen for the first time.https://www.reddit.com/r/retrogaming/comments/11ddevl/atari_...
The spaceship beaming people up in Defender always looked like it's proportions were off. As a kid, I remember seeing the spaceship and thinking it looked like a metal glove.
There is also one from Bitmap Books but more about the actual game graphics.https://www.bitmapbooks.com/en-ca/collections/all-books/prod...
